text:
Shark (サメ型, Same-gata—lit. "Shark-type") Hunter × Hunter - Episode 101 (2011) was a shark Chimera Ant who served as a member of Leol's Squad within an Underground Lake. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 23, Chapter 238 

Appearance

Shark was a Chimera Ant resembling a large shark with numerous spots along his back and tail. 

Plot

Chimera Ant arc

As Killua Zoldyck hangs from a stalactite in an underground lake after saving Ikalgo, Shark suddenly jumps out of the water and bites down on Killua, beginning to crush him in between his jaws and the stalactite. He mocks Killua for letting his guard down and requests that he scream and wail for his amusement. Killua is relieved that Shark is the type he has no issue with killing, and he proceeds to swiftly slice through Shark's head with his hand, freeing himself as Shark's body falls into the water below. 

Though Shark is killed, Remora uses him as a decoy and distraction to discreetly place the Ortho Siblings' Darts De Darts tag on Killua's back. 

Manga Appearances

Trivia

Shark is only identified by his type of species in the credits for the 2011 anime adaptation. 
He is identified as「サメ」(Same, meaning "shark") in the Japanese credits and as "Shark" in the credits for the English dub. 
Shark shares his voice actor in the 2011 anime adaptation with Lippo.
In the English dub, he shares his voice actor with Remora and Bloster.
